coaching.title: Re-engage the Build Phase
coaching.message: 27 days post the 26.8-mile effort and you've been smart about base recovery. We're 19 weeks out from Julian Alps — time to ramp deliberately. Target this week: 4 quality runs + a Saturday long run at 16-18mi with sustained climbs. Conservative on pace, hard on consistency.

coaching.title: Fuel the climb
coaching.message: 190 lbs and entering Build means real protein loads (~152g/day) and carbs that match training volume. Build Phase weeks need 250+ daily carbs on doubles, 350+ on long-run days. No empty calories — every gram is doing work for the Alps.

coaching.title: Sleep is the workout
coaching.message: 133 days to race day. Build Phase volume only sticks if you sleep through it — 8 hours minimum, no exceptions. Watch HRV daily; if it drops below 60 two days in a row, pull back the next workout.

coaching.title: 26.8 was the floor, not the ceiling
coaching.message: The April 11 long run proved you can already cover the 50K distance. The next 19 weeks are about doing it on tired legs, on technical climbs, in the heat. Stack consistent weeks — the Alps reward whoever does the boring work between now and September.
